headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; frame-src https://www.google.com https://maps.google.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
